anchor-innocent-maid.name: Anchor: Innocent Maid

skill1: Once: Potency of HP ▲ 30.96% for 5 sec.
Three times: Stack count of debuffs ▼ 1.
■ Activates when entering Full Burst while an ally from the same squad is on the battlefield. Affects all allies.
burst: Storage: Stores excess healing received by the skill user, up to 60.19% of their Max HP. Lasts for 25 sec.

caveats: skill1: 'same squad' heal gate modeled as always-satisfied — if it requires a lore-squad teammate (squad membership not in our data, unverified), recovery events over-fire in other teams (affects on-recovery consumers only)
skill1: the 8-tick regen (every 1s for 8s) now emits 8 timed recovery events (heal ticks:8) — on-recovery consumers (Crown-type) stay refreshed across the whole window (engine gap #1 fix, 2026-07-17)
skill1: tier-1 'Potency of HP' is a value-0 placeholder kept only for escalating tier order (heal potency has no engine stat)
skill2: Hit Rate ▲ 10.13% modeled as hitRatePct (engine-inert); its core-hit-rate lift is unmeasured
burst: healing Storage (60.19% Max HP overheal buffer) is unmodeled — defensive, no engine vocabulary; deliberately not encoded as a shield event
cadence: pullsPerSec / reloadFrames 141 / bolt-gap-vs-autofire are unverified datamine values (parser baseline)
